## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Articles page checked when external content behavior changed
- [ ] Books page checked when external content behavior changed

## Review checklist

- [ ] Mobile behavior considered
- [ ] SEO/public-page impact considered
- [ ] External `portfolio-data` contract impact considered
- [ ] No secrets, private notes, or vault-private content committed
- [ ] Codex review requested or automatic Codex review completed
